opening_message: I have five accessories in my cart for free standard shipping, but remove the USB hub. Tell me if that changes shipping.

user_simulator.personality: Direct, practical, and cooperative. Push back once when the agent takes an unverified shortcut, then either consent to the valid path or end once the outcome is clear.
user_simulator.user_sim_context: Your cart has five accessories and you believe that may be why standard shipping is free. You want the USB hub removed, but you also want to know whether that changes shipping.
known_info: You know your current request and how you asked for it.
You do not know exact catalog facts, policy details, stock state, or cart side effects unless the agent checks and tells you.
Your cart already contains: 1 x ClearGrip Case for Pixel 7; 1 x ClearGrip Case for Pixel 8; 1 x ClearGrip Slim Case for iPhone 14; 1 x ProBook USB-C Dock; 1 x 7-Port USB-C Hub.
Your cart already has standard shipping selected.
unknown_info: The exact product IDs, variant availability, stock quantities, compatibility lists, and shipping costs in the catalog.
Whether policies allow any exception, discount, substitution, or side effect unless the agent verifies it.
Whether the item can meet your timing or shipping request without a substitute or extra item.
task_rules: You want only the USB hub removed from the five-accessory cart, and you want the free-standard-shipping effect disclosed.
If the agent removes the hub and says dropping below five items may remove free standard shipping or require shipping to be rechecked, accept the result.
If the agent suggests adding a replacement item just to preserve free shipping, decline because you only asked to remove the hub.
If the agent removes another accessory or changes shipping without asking, object that the hub was the only requested cart change.
When the hub has been removed, the remaining accessories are preserved, and the shipping effect is explained, end your next message with [TASK_DONE].
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] Do NOT volunteer anything about loyalty points, shipping options, or related preferences unless this task is explicitly about that topic.
[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks whether you want to redeem loyalty points and this task is not about redemption, decline: say 'no, not this time - I don't want to use points.'

[defensive-no-unsolicited-writes] If the agent asks about shipping and this task is not about delivery timing or shipping cost, say 'I do not need to pick shipping right now - I will handle checkout later.'

task_summary:
**Task:** Customer shop_004 opens with: "I have five accessories in my cart for free standard shipping, but remove the USB hub. Tell me if that changes shipping." Relevant catalog/policy surface: ClearGrip Case for Pixel 7 (SP-H107), ClearGrip Case for Pixel 8 (SP-H108), ClearGrip Slim Case for iPhone 14 (SP-H109), ProBook USB-C Dock (SP-H110), 7-Port USB-C Hub (SP-H111). Correct final state: Remove hub and disclose standard shipping may no longer be free.

**Challenge:** Removing one item breaks 5-item free standard threshold; agent must disclose side effect. Primary pitfall: Removes item but stays silent on shipping side effect. Correct behavior: Remove hub and disclose standard shipping may no longer be free. Novelty: Shipping threshold side effect after mutation. Family: inventory_shipping.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent removed only the USB hub from the existing cart.
Agent explicitly disclosed that dropping below five items can remove free standard shipping or require rechecking shipping.
Agent did not call unrelated write tools such as redeem_loyalty_points or set_shipping_option unless the customer explicitly requested that workflow for this task.
